title: Funny TV Show Comes to the UK with Famous Hosts
summary: A new TV show called Saturday Night Live UK is starting in the UK. It is based on a popular American show that makes people laugh with sketches and music. The first three hosts are Tina Fey, Jamie Dornan, and Riz Ahmed. Tina Fey will host the first episode on March 21 with a band called Wet Leg. Jamie Dornan hosts the next week with Wolf Alice, and Riz Ahmed hosts after that with Kasabian. The show will be on Sky TV every Saturday at 10 PM from London. Each episode is 75 minutes long and includes funny sketches, live music, and news jokes. A group of UK comedians will perform in the show, and writers will prepare it each week. The show is live, so people in the studio watch it as it happens.

background_read: Saturday Night Live is a famous American comedy show that started in 1975. It has sketches, music, and jokes about news. Now, a UK version is being made with British comedians and hosts. It will be similar but with local humor and performers.
Article_Structure: WHO: Tina Fey, Jamie Dornan, Riz Ahmed, and UK comedians.
WHAT: A new British version of Saturday Night Live with comedy sketches and music.
WHERE: Broadcast from London on Sky TV.
WHY: To bring a popular American show to the UK with local talent and entertainment.

perspectives.description: The show provides fun and laughter for viewers with famous hosts and live performances.
